title: Actual Cherries
description: Adds cherries that drop from cherry blossoms.
body:
This mod is pretty self explanatory. Cherry blossoms now have a chance of dropping cherries.
(However you can make cherry pies by using the recipe used for pumpkin pies but replacing the pumpkin with a cherry!)

(Curseforge version: https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/actual-cherries-fabric-quilt)

 

Dependencies:
Cloth Config, Fabric API
